Especially under the moonlight, the calm, focused, and powerful presence of his dancing figure made her heart race inexplicably, and she seemed to sober up from most of the alcohol. 

When Lin Chen finished performing a set of fist techniques and stood firm with a long breath, heat rising around him, forming a faint white mist under the cold moonlight, Xiangyun finally saw his face clearly. 

"Lin...... Brother Lin?" Xiangyun blurted out, both surprised and delighted. She hadn't expected to run into Lin Chen here, nor to see him practicing martial arts. Under the moonlight, Lin Chen's face was flushed from intense exercise, his eyes bright and clear. The calm and restrained aura between his brows contrasted sharply with the fierce and domineering style he had shown during their earlier practice, making him even more captivating. The orangutan felt cloak she was wearing slipped off her shoulders, and she didn't notice it at all. 

Lin Chen turned his head upon hearing the sound and saw Shi Xiangyun standing gracefully in the moonlit snowy field, her cheeks flushed, eyes dreamy, her hair slightly messy, a few strands of black hair hanging down her cheeks, wearing only a simple jacket and skirt, with the cloak covering her nearly slipping off, clearly having drunk quite a bit. He frowned slightly and stepped forward a few paces: "Sister Xiangyun? Why are you here alone? And dressed so lightly?" His tone carried a barely noticeable concern as he scanned the surroundings to confirm that no one else was there. 

"I...... I'm coming out for some fresh air." Xiangyun saw Lin Chen approaching, and for no apparent reason, she felt a pang of panic, but also a bit pleased. She grinned foolishly and said, "Brother Lin, the way you were boxing just now was really good-looking! Better than ...... Even better looking than the martial artists on stage! No, you're way more impressive than all of them! ” 

She spoke with a hint of drunkenness, a bit confused, but her eyes sparkled, full of undisguised admiration and ...... admiration. 

Seeing her unsteady steps and unsteady standing, Lin Chen quickly reached out to support her: "You've had too much to drink. I'll take you home." Where he touched her, he felt her arm was icy cold. 

"I'm not going back! I'm suffocating inside!" Xiangyun suddenly became stubborn. Riding on the alcohol, she grew bolder, grabbed Lin Chen's sleeve with a reverse grip, tilted her little face up, and stared straight at him, her eyes shimmering. "Brother Lin, you...... You're amazing! You can do martial arts, play the zither, and you're so beautiful! I ...... "I......" She paused, as if gathering courage, then shouted, "I just like it like this! Much better than Baoyu, who only knows how to eat rouge and cry! ” 

Her words were earth-shattering, carrying Xiangyun's usual openness and directness, yet because of her drunkenness, she relaxed her usual restraint, laying bare the feelings she had buried deep in her heart under the moonlight. 

Lin Chen was slightly taken aback. He knew Xiangyun was straightforward and had feelings for him, but he hadn't expected her to show it so openly after getting drunk. The girl's eyes, brightened by the alcohol, her flushed cheeks, and her cold, small hand tightly clutching his sleeve all conveyed an unmistakably passionate emotion. 

"Ding!" Detected that an important plot character 'Shi Xiangyun' is in a special state (Drunken Truth), with intense emotional fluctuations toward the host, and the effect of Succubus constitution is significantly triggered. Gain +20 favorability for Shi Xiangyun (Admiration → deep affection). Receive a large amount of lively, open, and fiery, sincere pure energy, significantly nourishing the martial arts foundation, greatly enhancing internal energy activity and explosive power, and deepening understanding of the fierce side of 'Vajra Fist.' Special effect: Strength and reaction speed significantly increased for a short time. ” 

The moment the system notification sounded, a surge of energy—hotter, livelier, and more open than ever before—surged into Lin Chen's body like a river breaking through a dam! This energy was filled with Xiangyun's unconditional admiration and sincerity, instantly igniting his vital energy. The flow of his inner energy sped up dramatically, a sense of power filled his limbs and bones, and his understanding of the Diamond Fist's supremely fierce and fierce intent became clear and profound! He even felt that if he used the Vajra Fist now, his power would increase by thirty percent out of thin air! 

At the same time, another system notification sounded: "Host detected near Xiaoxiang Pavilion. Would you like to perform today's basic check-in?" ” 

"Sign in." Lin Chen silently recited in his heart, but his actions didn't stop. He gently steadied Xiangyun, put the slipped cloak back over her, and tied it tightly. 

"Ding!" Successfully signed in near Xiaoxiang Pavilion! Obtained: Strength Soul Pill x1 (Mortal grade top-grade pill, mainly made from several herbs that enhance energy and temper muscles and bones, refined with the essence blood of demon beasts. After consumption, it greatly enhances physical strength and strengthens muscles and bones, providing excellent support for breaking through realm bottlenecks, especially suitable for those practicing fierce external martial arts). ” 

Another precious pill to obtain! The Soul Strength Pill was exactly the resource he needed to consolidate his late ninth rank and break through to higher realms! Xiangyun's drunken confession this time unexpectedly brought him double gains. 

"Xiangyun, you're drunk. You're talking drunk." Lin Chen's tone was gentle, yet carried unquestionable determination. He gently pried Xiangyun's hand from his sleeve and instead held her arm. "It's windy at night, so I'll take you home to rest first." If you have something to say, let's talk after you wake up tomorrow, okay? ” 

"I'm not drunk!" Xiangyun refused, but her body was indeed weak. Even with Lin Chen supporting her, she couldn't struggle. She just tilted her head back, stubbornly looking at him, her eyes shimmering with tears yet strikingly bright. "Brother Lin, I'm telling the truth! I'm not drunk! I just like you! I like how amazing you are, how handsome you are, and how good you treat people! I don't want to be like Sister Lin and the others, keeping everything bottled up in my heart! Liking is liking, what's there to say you can't say? ” 

Her voice grew softer, tinged with grievance and stubbornness: "I know, Brother Lin, you might like Sister Lin, or Sister Bao, quiet and quiet...... But I...... That's just my personality, I can't change. I don't care about what you do, just ...... As long as you don't find me annoying, don't ignore me......" As she spoke, her eyes turned slightly red. 

Lin Chen sighed softly in his heart. Xiangyun's candid sincerity was like a blazing sun—fiery and pure, without a trace of impurity. This feeling was heavy and precious. He was not heartless; how could he remain indifferent? But he knew well that he bore the system and mission, with an uncertain road ahead, and the love ties in this Dream of the Red Chamber world were intricate...... 

"How could I ever find you annoying?" Lin Chen slowed his voice, gently wiping away the tears that had yet to fall at the corner of her eyes with his fingertips, his movements soft. "Xiangyun, you're honest and adorable, with a childlike heart—I appreciate you the most." It's just that you're still young. Some things, maybe wait until you're sober, think it through, and then talk about it. It's not too late. ” 

He paused, looked at Xiangyun's still stubborn gaze, and said seriously, "No matter what, you will always be my Xiangyun sister." That will never change. ” 

These words were both a reassurance and a promise. He would not easily promise an uncertain future, but would cherish this sincere feeling. 

Xiangyun listened, and although her heart still ached, the words "Always my Xiangyun sister" were like a warm current, soothing her restless heart. She stopped struggling, letting Lin Chen support her, gently resting her head on his shoulder, and softly uttered a "mm" with a strong nasal sound. 

Lin Chen supported her and turned to walk toward Qiushuang Studio. Xiangyun's steps were unsteady, most of her weight resting on him. The garden was silent at night, with only the two of them making "crunching" sounds as they stepped on the snow and Xiangyun's occasional, tipsy whispers. 

"Brother Lin......" 

"Hmm?" 

"On you...... Warm ......" 

“……” 

When they reached the vicinity of Qiushuang Studio, Cuilü and several young maids were already waiting anxiously with lanterns. Seeing Lin Chen supporting Xiangyun back, Cuilü was both surprised and delighted, and hurried forward to take them: "Thank you, Young Master Lin! We're so anxious!" ” 

"It's fine. Xiangyun drank a few more cups and took good care of her. Let her sleep and give her plenty of warm water." Lin Chen handed Xiangyun to Cuilü, then gave a few instructions to the attendant who had come out (Tanchun's maid; Xiangyun is temporarily staying at Qiushuang Studio with Tanchun). 

"Brother Lin...... Xiangyun was supported by Cui Lü. Before entering, she glanced back at Lin Chen again, her eyes hazy but with a clear smile. "I...... I'm not drunk...... I'm serious...... After saying that, Cui Lü half-supported and half-embraced her. 

Lin Chen stood outside Qiushuang Studio, watching the door close and the lights lit before turning to leave. In his palm, the freshly signed "Soul Strength Pill" still held a lingering warmth. In his mind, Xiangyun's candid and passionate confession and those eyes full of sincerity and admiration lingered on him. 

"Shi Xiangyun......" he murmured softly, a faint, gentle smile appearing at the corner of his mouth—one even he himself hadn't noticed. 

Back at Tingzhu Pavilion, he took out the Soul Pill. The pill was dark red, about the size of a longan, with fine blood-red patterns on the surface, emitting a faint, unsettled fragrance that stirred the qi and blood. He didn't take it immediately, but put it away first. Today was quite fruitful, but the matter with Xiangyun also filled his heart with a heavy yet warm feeling. 

He sat cross-legged, and with the help of the Qingxin tea, calmed his mind and began to absorb the scorching energy Xiangyun had brought, continuing to refine his Vajra Fist. 

The night is still long. But once the seeds of emotion break through the soil, it is hard to stop their growth.


Chapter 15 System Upgrade, Unlocking Advanced Check-in

The intense energy from Xiangyun's drunken words surged within him for an entire night. Lin Chen circulated the "Small Circulation Inner Breathing Method," guiding this lively, open, and sincere power to merge and refine with his own inner breath and the energy provided by the other women. This not only solidified his newly broken-through ninth-grade late-stage realm but also elevated the "activity" and explosive power of his inner breath to a new level. Nourished by this intense energy, the fierce intent of the Vajra Fist became even purer and more refined. The fifth move, "Vajra Wrathful Gaze," could already be used in combat. Although it was still some distance from "Soul-Stealing Strike," it was enough to disrupt the opponent's mind at crucial moments.

At dawn, the first rays of sunlight streamed through the window. Lin Chen finished his cultivation, slowly opened his eyes, his gaze filled with inner light, his aura as deep and solid as a mountain. He opened his palms, palms facing upwards, and with a slight thought, a wisp of pale golden, mercury-like inner energy emanated from his fingertips, fluctuating and faintly carrying the sounds of wind and thunder. This was the outward manifestation of a late-stage ninth-grade inner energy that had reached a certain level of profound refinement.

"My strength is steadily improving, but compared to the true powerhouses of this high-level martial arts world, it's still insignificant." Lin Chen wasn't complacent; instead, he was even more sober-minded. The Jia family mansion was merely a residence in Jinling City; the outside world was far more vast and dangerous. A seventh-rank cultivator could fight a hundred men, a fifth-rank cultivator could fly using Qi... those were the goals he needed to pursue in the short term.

He got up, washed, ate a simple breakfast, and then focused his mind on the system. He had accumulated ten daily check-ins and first-time location check-ins in recent times; according to the detailed instructions, the system should be upgrading.

"System, display current status," Lin Chen silently commanded.

A familiar semi-transparent light screen unfolded before his eyes:

[Host: Lin Chen]

[Cultivation Level: Late Ninth Rank (Stable)]

[Cultivation Technique: Lesser Circulation Inner Breathing Technique (Low Yellow Rank, Proficient)]

[Martial Arts: Stone-Splitting Fist (High-grade Mortal Rank, Proficient), Vajra Fist (Mid-grade Yellow Rank, Beginner), Light and Agile Steps (Low-grade Yellow Rank, Proficient), Musical Proficiency (Special Skill, Passive)]

[Constitution: Succubus Constitution (Mid-Awakening, Progress 18%)]

[Items: Body Tempering Pill (Used), Qi and Blood Pill x1, Inner Breath Amplification Card (1 hour), Mind-Clearing Tea x1 (Remaining 2/3), Power Pill x1, Defense Jade Pendant (Fully Charged)...]

[Energy Absorption: Lin Daiyu (Continuous, Dependence → Admiration), Shi Xiangyun (Continuous, Deep Affection), Xue Baochai (Continuous, Curiosity), Xiren (Continuous, Favorability), Miaoyu (Slight Amount, Curiosity)]

[Special: Affinity Nourishment (Active)]

[Sign-in Count: 10/10 (Cumulative)]

As expected, the cumulative sign-in count has reached ten times.

"Ding! Detected that the host has accumulated 10 check-ins, meeting the system upgrade requirements. System upgrade program initiating..."

In his mind, the familiar, cold mechanical voice suddenly acquired a subtle, indescribable rhythm, as if it had become more "vivid." At the same time, the system screen before him suddenly shone brightly, and countless fine, pale golden points of light emerged from the void, converging towards the center of the screen like rivers flowing into the sea, forming a slowly rotating vortex.

The vortex of light spun faster and faster, emitting a gentle yet undeniable energy fluctuation. Lin Chen could sense that this energy fluctuation wasn't acting on the outside world, but rather resonating directly with his spirit and even the depths of his soul in a mysterious way. He calmed his mind and focused intently, carefully experiencing this change.

After about the time it takes to brew a cup of tea, the spinning vortex suddenly contracted inward, transforming into an extremely solid point of light, and then exploded outwards! A completely new, clearer, and more complex translucent light screen unfolded before his eyes once more. The edges of the light screen had turned a light, shimmering gold, appearing even more exquisite and magnificent. The previously simple category classifications had become more detailed, and several new sections had been added.

"System upgrade complete! Current version: 1.1."

"New features unlocked:

Advanced Check-in: Can be triggered once per month. The host can specify an unlocked 'important location' (such as the main hall of Rongguo Mansion, Xiaoxiang Pavilion, Lixiang Courtyard, Qinfang Gate, Longcui Nunnery, etc.), or it can be automatically triggered when specific conditions are met to perform advanced check-in. Advanced check-in has a higher probability of obtaining higher-grade rewards (Yellow Rank High and above), including but not limited to rare cultivation techniques, high-grade pills, divine weapons, special items, etc. Monthly check-ins do not accumulate, please choose the timing and location carefully."

Information Panel (Optimized):

【Attribute Panel】: Quantifies and displays the host's current overall status, including cultivation realm, blood and qi strength, mental strength, inner energy purity, and basic attributes such as root bone comprehension (first generation requires scanning, taking three breaths).

【Bond Panel】: Provides detailed information on the affinity level, current status, energy absorption efficiency, and bond characteristics of characters with whom the host has established connections. Facilitates the host in maintaining and developing important interpersonal relationships.

Monthly Benefits: After the system upgrade, on the first day of each month, the host will automatically receive one opportunity for "doubled basic sign-in rewards" (only valid for the first basic sign-in of the day).

Storage Space Expansion: The system's personal storage space has been expanded from 1 cubic meter to 3 cubic meters, allowing the host to carry more items.

New Player Upgrade Gift Pack: 3 Inner Breath Pills (Low-grade Yellow Rank, can purify inner breath, slightly improve cultivation).

A series of system notifications rang out, a massive amount of information. Lin Chen's eyes flashed as he carefully digested these new features.

"Advanced Sign-in... Once a month, a precious opportunity, must be used at the most crucial locations or times." Lin Chen focused on this first. This meant he would have a stable opportunity to acquire high-level resources every month, a strategically significant move. He needed to plan carefully.

"Attribute Panel and Bond Panel..." Lin Chen's mind raced, "Open Attribute Panel."

"Attribute Panel Generating... Scan Begins..."

An invisible, gentle wave swept over Lin Chen's entire body, seemingly able to penetrate his flesh and blood, revealing his very essence. Three breaths later, his attribute panel clearly appeared:

[Host: Lin Chen]

[Cultivation: Late Ninth Rank (Experience Points: 78/100)]

[Health and Vitality: 125/150 (Vigorous)] (Note: The standard health and vitality of a typical late-stage Ninth Rank martial artist is approximately 100)

[Mental Strength: 89/100 (Relatively Strong)] (Note: Due to his transmigration and special physique, his mental strength is superior to others of the same rank)

[Internal Breath Purity: 72/100 (Refined)] (Note: Nourished by multi-attribute affinity energy and the Tranquilizing Tea, the internal breath is relatively pure.)

[Innate Constitution: 7/10 (Above Average)] (Note: The original owner's innate constitution was ordinary, but improved through the tempering pills and Vajra Fist.)

[Comprehension: 9/10 (Excellent)] (Note: Integrating the experience of a martial arts master from a previous life, comprehension is outstanding.)

[Combat Strength Assessment: Comparable to a peak ninth-rank martial artist, capable of fighting against someone newly entering the eighth rank.]

After quantification, his own condition was clear at a glance. Lin Chen nodded slightly. His advantages lay in the purity of his internal breath, vigorous blood and qi (thanks to the tempering pills and continuous nourishment), strong mental power, and high comprehension. Innate constitution was a weakness, but it could be compensated for through subsequent pills and body-refining techniques. The combat strength assessment also matched his self-assessment.

"Open the Bond Panel."

The light screen switches, and a new list unfolds:

[Bond List (Sorted by Energy Absorption Efficiency)]:

Lin Daiyu

Affection: 65 (Admiration, Deep Affection, Feeling Dependent)

Current Status: Slightly Relieved of Worries, Occasional Concern

Energy Absorption Efficiency: High (Cool and Elegant, Improves Control and Comprehension)

Bond Trait: A Touch of Understanding (Slightly Improves Sensitivity to Host's Emotions)

Shi Xiangyun

Affection: 60 (Deep Affection, Open and Passionate, Unwavering Sincerity)

Current Status: Slightly Awake from Intoxication, Heart in Turmoil

Energy Absorption Efficiency: High (Lively and Open, Improves Explosiveness and Vitality)

Bond Trait: Childlike Innocence (Energy transfer is more direct and intense)

Xue Baochai

Affection Level: 25 (Curious, aloof yet appreciative)

Current Status: Dignified and self-possessed, secretly observing

Energy Absorption Efficiency: Medium (Mellow and balanced, enhancing stability and foundation)

Bond Trait: Cool Fragrance and Focus (Slight resistance to negative mental influences)

Xiren

Affection Level: 25 (Favorable, attentive care, gradually developing feelings)

Current Status: Gentle and considerate, always caring

Energy Absorption Efficiency: Medium (Gentle and delicate, nourishes meridians and blood)

Bond Trait: Like a Spring Breeze (Slightly increases the host's mental peace)

Miaoyu

Affection: 5 (A touch of curiosity amidst aloofness)

Current Status: Tranquil and focused, occasionally rippled

Energy Absorption Efficiency: Low (Clear and aloof, increases purity and mental stability)

Bond Trait: Zen-like Serenity (Extremely weak resonance with the host's alluring aura)

The bond panel quantifies and clarifies previously vague feelings. Daiyu and Xiangyun indeed have the highest affection and energy supply, and both possess special bond traits. Baochai and Xiren provide a stable medium level of energy, with additional effects. Although Miaoyu's affection is low, her energy characteristics are special, and the "Zen-like Serenity" trait suggests she is not entirely indifferent to her succubus constitution, which might be a breakthrough.

"It seems that maintaining and deepening my bonds with these beauties is not only necessary for advancing my physique and absorbing energy, but their accompanying special effects are also quite beneficial to cultivation and combat," Lin Chen mused. Daiyu's "A Touch of Understanding" might provide early warnings or enhance teamwork at crucial moments; Xiangyun's "A Childlike Heart" makes energy transfer more efficient; Baochai's "Cool Fragrance Concentrates the Mind" can help resist mental attacks; Xiren's "Like a Spring Breeze" is beneficial for calming the mind and preventing demonic possession; Miaoyu's "Zen Mind Ripples" might help him control his physique…

"The monthly benefits and expanded storage space are also very useful," Lin Chen turned his attention back to other features. Doubling the basic sign-in rewards means increased efficiency in acquiring daily resources. The expanded storage space allows him to carry more pills, weapons, and even special items obtained from sign-ins.

Finally, there was the "Newbie Upgrade Gift Pack": three low-grade Yellow Rank "Inner Breath Pills." He took one out; the pill was pale blue, about the size of a longan, with cloud-like patterns on its surface and a subtle fragrance. The system description read: "Can purify inner breath and slightly improve cultivation." Perfect for consolidating his current late-stage Ninth Rank realm.

He didn't consume it immediately but carefully stored it away. Now that the system upgrade was complete and he was familiar with the new functions, it was time to consider the location for his first "Advanced Sign-in."

The detailed guide indicated that the first Advanced Sign-in was at "Yihong Courtyard." It was Jia Baoyu's residence, a popular spot, and a frequent gathering place for the Twelve Beauties, where fortunes intertwined; perhaps he could obtain unexpected goodies by signing in. However, Yihong Courtyard was different from other places; Baoyu resided there frequently, and there were many maids and servants, making it difficult to complete the sign-in quietly. He needed to wait for the right opportunity.

“Perfect timing. I haven’t taken the Strength Pill yet. I can use the Inner Breath Pill and the Strength Pill to try and break through to the peak of the ninth rank, or even peek at the threshold of the eighth rank. With a further improvement in strength, I can act with more composure.” Lin Chen finalized his plan. He intended to first use the Inner Breath Pill to purify his inner energy and solidify his foundation, then take the Strength Pill to strengthen his bones and muscles and enhance his strength, combined with the body-refining effects of the Vajra Fist, to attempt a breakthrough.

He didn’t delay any longer, returned to his meditation room, and sat cross-legged. He first took out an Inner Breath Pill and swallowed it.

The pill melted instantly upon entering his mouth, transforming into a cool and pure torrent that rapidly permeated his limbs and bones. This medicinal power wasn't overpowering, but exceptionally pure and enduring, like a gentle stream seeping into every corner of his inner energy, slowly washing away and removing even the smallest impurities, making his inner energy more refined and clear. His foundation, which had been slightly weakened due to the rapid advancement, quickly became solid and stable under the nourishment of this pure medicinal power. His cultivation experience points visibly jumped from 78 to 85.

Such a remarkable effect from a single pill! Lin Chen's spirits lifted, and after the medicinal power was fully absorbed, he took a second one. His inner energy was purified and enhanced once more, reaching 92 experience points.

He didn't take a third pill, but instead temporarily adjusted his breathing, allowing his body to fully adapt to this pure state. Then, he took out the "Strength Pill."

Holding the dark red pill in his hand, it emitted a strange, intoxicating fragrance. Lin Chen could sense that this pill contained a violent yet pure power specifically designed to temper the physical body and unleash potential. He adjusted his breathing, bringing himself to his optimal state, and swallowed the Power Pill.

The pill didn't immediately dissolve upon entering his stomach; instead, it sank into his dantian like a red-hot iron block. The next moment, it exploded!

A scorching, violent, yet vibrant torrent of energy erupted from the dantian! This power was unlike the gentle purity of the Inner Breath Pill; it surged wildly through his limbs and bones, penetrating every meridian, every bone, and every muscle! A sharp, burning pain shot through him, as if his body was being forged in flames and hammered by a giant hammer!

Lin Chen groaned, veins bulging on his forehead, his skin instantly turning crimson and radiating heat. He dared not be careless, immediately circulating his inner energy through the *Small Circulation Internal Breathing Technique* at full power, simultaneously visualizing the intent of the Vajra Fist, guiding the violent medicinal power to temper his body according to the Vajra Fist's methods, impacting, expanding, and strengthening every corner of his body.

His bones emitted a series of cracking sounds, as if undergoing reconstruction; muscle fibers were torn, then rapidly healed under the medicinal power, becoming more resilient; his meridians were forcibly widened, causing a throbbing pain, but also becoming more flexible, able to accommodate more and more violent internal energy flows.

Painful, but accompanied by a rapid increase in strength! He could clearly feel his physical strength, defense, and endurance increasing at an astonishing rate! His Qi and Blood values ​​jumped rapidly on the panel, finally stopping at 180/180 (the limit)! His Root Bone also increased from 7 points to 8 points!

Under the influence of the potent medicinal power and the strengthening of his physical body, his internal energy became even more powerful and surging, like a river bursting its banks, roaring and rushing through his expanded meridians. His cultivation experience points instantly broke through the 100 mark, and with no sign of slowing down, continued to climb higher!

"Now!" Lin Chen roared inwardly, concentrating all his energy and guiding the surging power within him to its absolute limit, launching a ferocious assault on the invisible barrier separating the ninth and eighth ranks!

"Boom—!"

A deafening roar, as if the heavens and earth were splitting apart, resounded in his mind! His dantian trembled violently, and under the full force of this attack—a combination of the power of the Inner Breath Pill, the power of the Strength Pill, the Vajra Fist Intent, and the nourishment from days of arduous cultivation and the influence of his affinity—finally—a crack appeared!

The crack then rapidly spread, expanding like a spiderweb, until finally, it shattered!

An even more powerful, purer Inner Breath, its nature seemingly subtly altered, surged forth from behind the broken barrier, instantly filling his newly expanded and more resilient dantian and meridians! His blood and qi surged throughout his body like the roar of dragons and tigers, his bones throbbed, his five senses and six perceptions were heightened once more, and his perception of the primordial energy of heaven and earth became much clearer.

An unprecedented sense of power surged through his entire body.

Early stage of Rank 8, achieved!

Lin Chen slowly opened his eyes, his gaze gleaming with a clear, golden light that subtly shimmered within. His every glance exuded an imposing, unyielding aura. He lightly clenched his fist, creating a sonic boom in his palm—his power more than double what it had been before! The quantity and quality of his internal energy had undergone a qualitative leap, circulating smoothly and effortlessly, accompanied by the subtle interplay of wind and thunder.

"Finally…I've reached the eighth rank." Lin Chen stood up, feeling the transformative changes within his body, his heart filled with exhilaration. In this world of high martial arts, an eighth-rank martial artist was truly considered to have entered the inner sanctum, possessing the initial means to protect themselves and venture forth. Moreover, he had a premonition that, thanks to the exquisite Vajra Fist, the unique succubus physique, and numerous trump cards, his true combat strength far surpassed that of an ordinary early-stage eighth-rank martial artist.

He looked at the system panel; his cultivation level had changed to: [Cultivation: Early-stage Eighth Rank (Experience Points: 5/100)]. His attributes had also increased accordingly.

"It's time to go to the brothel for my first advanced check-in." Lin Chen's gaze turned eastward, towards the direction of the brothel. With his strength greatly improved, it was time to take the first step in his plan.


Chapter 16 Advanced Sign-in at the Brothel: Obtain Divine Weapon Fragments

Breaking through to the early stage of the eighth rank brings about comprehensive changes.

The total amount and purity of internal energy leaps, the meridians become wider and stronger, and the qi and blood are as abundant as a furnace, imbuing every movement with immense power. The most obvious change is the enhancement of the five senses and spiritual awareness. The chirping of insects and birds dozens of feet away can be clearly heard; the subtle patterns of veins in leaves can be seen; and the flow of primordial energy in the air, which is thinner and more complex than the outside world, can be faintly perceived. Self-control also reaches a new level; the circulation of internal energy is smooth and effortless, controlled at will; the efficiency of the "Small Heavenly Circulation Breathing Method" increases accordingly, and the Small Heavenly Circulation becomes more stable and efficient.

The cultivation of the Vajra Fist also experienced a qualitative leap at the moment of breakthrough. The first five forms were completely mastered, not only doubling its power but also faintly touching the threshold of the sixth form, "Vajra Pushing the Mountain." That was a terrifying killing move that concentrated all the body's power into a single point, unleashing a force capable of pushing mountains and overturning seas. Lin Chen had a feeling that if he could master it, combined with eighth-grade internal energy, a full-force strike might actually be able to shake a small artificial mountain.

With increased strength comes increased confidence. The time is ripe for the first high-level sign-in.

Yihong Courtyard, located in the eastern part of the Grand View Garden, was specially built by Grandmother Jia for Baoyu. Its carved beams and painted rafters are exquisitely crafted and opulent. The courtyard is filled with exotic flowers and rare herbs, and a clear stream flows in from outside the walls, winding around the steps and houses, swirling beneath the bamboo in the front yard, adding to its refined elegance. This place is always filled with the sounds of birdsong, making it the most frequent gathering place for the younger generation of the Jia family. Its vibrant atmosphere and intertwined fortune make it the perfect choice for a high-level sign-in.

However, this place was also the most difficult to infiltrate. Baoyu often stayed here, surrounded by numerous maids and servants: Granny Li, Xiren, Qingwen, Sheyue, Qiuwen, Bihen… all sharp-witted and perceptive. Furthermore, Grandmother Jia and Lady Wang frequently visited. Although the security wasn't as tight as the outer courtyard, it still wouldn't allow outsiders to enter freely.

Lin Chen didn't choose to force his way in during the day. He waited patiently until night fell, the moon and stars disappeared, and all was quiet. Estimating that everyone in Yihong Courtyard had retired for the night, he changed into a dark gray, practical outfit, concealed his presence to the minimum, and as if blending into the darkness, quietly left Tingzhu Pavilion.

With his eighth-grade cultivation, the power and stealth of his Lightness Step reached new heights. He no longer needed to frequently borrow strength; his figure moved freely, silently traversing the pavilions and terraces of the garden like a ghost. Occasionally, his toes would lightly touch the roof tiles or treetops, and he would have already covered several feet, landing silently and leaving no trace in the snow. Occasionally, a night patrol woman would pass by with a lantern; he only needed to sense her in advance, and with a flash, he would hide behind the shadows of the artificial hills or pillars, easily avoiding her without her noticing.

Before long, the brightly lit Yihong Courtyard, where faint sounds of music and laughter could still be heard, came into view. Lin Chen crouched in the canopy of a tall sycamore tree, carefully observing the surroundings through the foliage.

The main gate was tightly closed, but faint lights shone from the east and west side gates, presumably where the night watchwomen were. The main house, "Jiangyun Pavilion," was brightly lit, and faint voices could be heard, indicating that Baoyu was still awake, or perhaps a maid was keeping watch. Scattered lights also shone in the west wing and side rooms.

“Baoyu hasn’t rested yet, this is a bit troublesome.” Lin Chen’s gaze swept across the area, finally settling on the backyard of Yihong Courtyard. There was a small garden there, with craggy rocks, lush flowers and trees, and a miniature pond fed by flowing water, upon which stood the “Concave Crystal Stream Pavilion,” a perfect place to cool off in the summer. This place was relatively secluded, rarely visited, and within the grounds of Yihong Courtyard; perhaps he could try checking in.

He observed for a moment, confirming that no one was in the backyard, then his figure gracefully descended from the treetops, like a falling leaf, silently landing outside the back wall of Yihong Courtyard. The wall was about ten feet high, but it was practically useless to him. With a light touch of his toes, he swooped onto the top of the wall like a wild goose, crouching down to look down.

The backyard was indeed quiet, save for the rustling of bamboo leaves in the wind and the gentle flow of the pond. Moonlight filtered through gaps in the clouds, casting soft shadows on the rocks, flowers, and trees.

This is it. Lin Chen took a deep breath, focused his mind, and focused his thoughts on the system.

"System, designated location 'Yihong Courtyard' for first-time advanced check-in."

"Command confirmed. Host detected within the [Yihong Courtyard] area, meeting advanced check-in requirements. Initiating advanced check-in..."

The system's notification sounded more solemn than usual, carrying a strange rhythm. Lin Chen could feel an invisible, more powerful detection wave, centered on him, silently spreading outwards, sweeping across the entire Yihong Courtyard, as if absorbing and gathering some kind of "luck" and "spiritual essence" of the place.

This process lasted for about ten breaths. After ten breaths, the wave suddenly subsided.

"Ding! First-time advanced check-in successful!"

"Congratulations, host, you have obtained:

Qingfeng Sword Fragment x1 (Special item; collect 3 fragments to synthesize the Yellow-Rank High-Grade Divine Weapon 'Qingfeng Sword'. Current progress: 1/3.)

Agility Enhancement Card (3 hours) (One-time consumable; after use, agility-related skills are enhanced by 50% for three hours, significantly increasing movement speed, evasion rate, and agility.)

Additional Rewards: Due to your first Advanced Sign-in, you have received an 'Advanced Sign-in Gift Pack' x1, containing: Low-Grade Spirit Stones x5 (can be used to accelerate cultivation, replenish inner energy, drive formations, etc.), and a random Mortal-Rank High-Grade Pill x1 (randomly obtains one type upon opening)."

What generous rewards! Lin Chen's heart leaped with excitement.

Fragments of the Azure Edge Sword! A high-grade Yellow-rank divine weapon! This is a treasure far surpassing anything he currently possesses. In the martial arts world, a good divine weapon can greatly enhance a martial artist's combat power. Although the Azure Edge Sword requires collecting three fragments to synthesize, having a goal is always better than being clueless. Moreover, this is the reward for his first high-level sign-in; he might be able to obtain fragments elsewhere later.

A Movement Amplification Card: Increases movement ability by 50% for three hours. In crucial moments, whether chasing, escaping, or engaging in hit-and-run tactics, it's a life-saving and deadly weapon.

Five Low-grade Spirit Stones! This is a martial arts cultivation resource even more valuable than gold and silver. The pure spiritual energy contained within can be directly absorbed and refined, with effects far surpassing arduous cultivation. Although only low-grade, it's an excellent supplement for his current cultivation level.

And a random pill—another unexpected delight.

"Activate the random pill," Lin Chen silently recited.

"Successfully activated! Obtained: Rejuvenating Powder x1 (High-grade Mortal Rank, suitable for both internal and external use. Excellent for both external and internal injuries, quickly stops bleeding, promotes tissue regeneration, and restores vitality)."

A miraculous healing elixir! In this perilous world, a good healing medicine is sometimes more precious than a elixir that enhances strength.

A bountiful harvest! Lin Chen stored the rewards into his expanded storage space, feeling satisfied. His first high-level sign-in was well worth the money.

He was preparing to silently return the way he came when suddenly, his ears twitched. He caught a very faint, yet incredibly close, footstep sound coming from the path behind the artificial hill in the garden ahead! Accompanying it was a barely audible, weary sigh.

Someone's coming! Lin Chen's heart skipped a beat. He was currently crouching on the wall; if the other person walked straight towards him, they would be easily seen. Retreating was too late; the backyard was below the wall, making him even more vulnerable.

In a flash, his mind raced. Like a gecko, he silently slid down the wall, clinging to the shadows at its base. He held his breath, concealing his presence to the extreme, almost blending into his surroundings. At the same time, he clutched a sharp-edged stone he'd picked up along the way, just in case.

The footsteps drew closer. A slender figure emerged from behind the artificial hill, carrying a small, delicate glass lantern. The dim light illuminated her refined and gentle face, a hint of weariness lingering between her brows. It was Xiren, Baoyu's head maid.

She seemed to have gotten up in the middle of the night, or had just finished some chores and was heading back to her room to rest. Reaching the pond, she stopped, put down the lantern, and scooped up a handful of cold water to wash her face, seemingly trying to dispel her drowsiness. Moonlight bathed her, and her thin clothes rustled slightly in the night breeze.

After washing her face, she didn't leave immediately. Instead, by the dim light of the lantern, she gazed blankly at her blurry reflection in the water, lost in thought. A moment later, another very soft sigh escaped her lips, tinged with an unspeakable sorrow.

"Are you troubled by Baoyu's matter?" A calm, gentle voice suddenly sounded not far behind her.

Xiren trembled with fright, turning around abruptly, almost dropping the lantern from her hand. When she saw the handsome figure slowly emerging from the shadows of the wall in the moonlight, the shock on her face instantly transformed into incredulous joy, and a hint of barely concealed panic.

"Lin...Young Master Lin?!" Xiren gasped, her voice trembling. "You...how could you be here? In the dead of night..." She instinctively looked around, confirming no one was there, but her heart pounded like a drum. In the dead of night, a man appearing in the backyard of Yihong Courtyard—if discovered, she and Lin Chen would have no way to explain themselves.

"I was just passing by when I heard a sigh, so I came to check." Lin Chen stopped a few steps away from her, his tone calm, carrying a reassuring strength. At this moment, his aura was restrained, his demeanor serene, appearing even more refined in the moonlight, strangely harmonious with the surrounding night. That fleeting glimpse of Xi Ren's weary and sorrowful expression had stirred something within him. This thoughtful and considerate maidservant likely also harbored many untold sorrows.

"Just passing by?" Xi Ren clearly didn't believe him. How could she possibly just pass by the inner courtyard of Yi Hong Courtyard? But she was quick-witted and didn't press the matter. The panic that had arisen from Lin Chen's sudden appearance had strangely subsided. Looking into the calm eyes of the young man before her, she suddenly felt that with him there, even the biggest troubles weren't so terrible. This thought made her cheeks flush slightly.

"It's late and the dew is heavy. Miss Xi Ren should rest early and not catch a cold," Lin Chen said gently, his gaze sweeping over her thin clothes.

"Thank you for your concern, young master," Xi Ren said, lowering her head slightly to avoid his gaze, but her heart warmed. Since entering the Jia family as a maid, no one had ever cared so attentively whether she was cold. Even Bao Yu was mostly childlike and needed care. This young master Lin, seemingly aloof, was actually incredibly thoughtful. "Young master… how have you been lately? I heard some time ago that Third Master Huan and Master She… haven't made things difficult for you anymore, have they?" She raised her eyes, her gaze filled with genuine concern.

"It's alright, everything's been resolved," Lin Chen replied briefly, a slight tremor in his heart at the genuine concern in her eyes. This Xi Ren was truly sincere. "But what about you? Is something troubling you? I noticed you looked tired earlier, as if something was on your mind."

Xi Ren was taken aback by his direct question, then gave a wry smile: "Nothing much, just some trivial matters in the household, not worth mentioning. Second Master (Bao Yu) has been in a bad mood lately, getting angry over small things, throwing things around, and the servants are trembling with fear. I have to put in a lot of effort to appease him. I also need to keep an eye on the Old Madam and Madam..." She paused, seemingly realizing she had said too much, and quickly added, "Please forgive my rudeness, it's just my duty."

“The capable are often burdened with more work, but they must also consider their own well-being,” Lin Chen said. He could imagine the difficulties Xi Ren faced in the Grand View Garden, navigating the complex relationships between Bao Yu, Grandmother Jia, Lady Wang, and numerous maids. Her thoughtfulness and forbearance were truly rare. “If you encounter any difficulties, and if it is within your power, you may come to Tingzhu Pavilion to find me.”

These words were a weighty promise. Xi Ren suddenly looked up, her eyes shimmering with shock, emotion, and even a hint of a quietly growing affection she herself was unaware of. In this deep, secluded mansion, a distant relative was actually willing to say to her, “You may come to find me…”

"Ding! Detected a significant change in the host's feelings towards the important plot character 'Xi Ren,' with a substantial increase in favorability. The succubus passive effect is triggered. Gained Xi Ren's favorability +15 (Devotion). Received a large influx of gentle, delicate, and pure energy filled with dependence and gratitude, nourishing the foundation of martial arts, making internal energy circulation smoother, and providing a slight boost to injury recovery. The bond trait 'Like a Spring Breeze' effect is enhanced."

The system notification and the accompanying surge of energy allowed Lin Chen to experience Xi Ren's emotional changes more deeply. This energy was gentle and full of dependence, like a spring drizzle, silently nourishing him, easing the slight tension in his mind caused by the night's actions and his recent breakthrough, making his internal energy flow more smoothly and naturally.

"Thank you... thank you, young master." Xi Ren's voice trembled slightly as she lowered her head, her fingers unconsciously twisting the hem of her clothes. "Young master's kindness, Xi Ren... will remember it. However, this is not a place to linger. If someone sees us, it may cause trouble. It would be best if young master left quickly."

“You’re right.” Lin Chen nodded, having no intention of lingering. “Keep this.” With a flick of his wrist, he retrieved a small porcelain bottle from his storage space—the “Rejuvenating Powder” he’d obtained from opening a random pill. “This medicine is remarkably effective for both internal and external injuries. You’re always by Second Master’s side, so you’re bound to get bumps and bruises. Keep this as a backup; it might come in an emergency.”

Xi Ren looked at the porcelain bottle offered to her, then at Lin Chen’s calm and sincere gaze. A surge of warmth welled up in her heart, and her eyes reddened slightly. Her hands trembled as she took it, clutching it tightly in her palm as if holding the most precious treasure in the world. “Young Master…this is too valuable…”

“Personal possessions are nothing compared to a person’s well-being.” Lin Chen smiled slightly. “Take care.”

With that, he didn’t linger. His figure blurred, and he leaped onto the wall like a wisp of smoke. In another flash, he vanished completely into the vast night, his speed so fast that Xi Ren almost thought it was an illusion.

Xi Ren stood there, stunned, staring at the empty wall. The warmth emanating from the porcelain bottle in her hand seemed to still carry that person's scent. A night breeze brought a chill, yet her heart burned with desire. After a long while, she carefully put away the bottle, picked up her lantern, and turned to walk towards her residence. Her steps seemed much lighter than when she came.

Back at Tingzhu Pavilion, Lin Chen checked the system again. Xi Ren's favorability rating had soared from 25 to 40 (Devoted), and her energy absorption efficiency had also improved from average to above average. This head maid of the Yi Hong Courtyard's brothel had feelings for him that were far from ordinary.

He took out the "Qingfeng Sword Fragment." The fragment was only the size of a thumb, dark blue in color, neither gold nor jade, and cool to the touch. Its edges had naturally formed, extremely mysterious patterns, faintly exuding a sharp aura. The system information indicated that three fragments needed to be collected under specific conditions (requiring a cultivation level of at least eighth rank and mastery of basic object manipulation techniques) to synthesize it.

"A divine weapon... I'm still missing two pieces." Lin Chen carefully put them away. This was the first item he had obtained related to a "divine weapon," making it exceptionally meaningful.

The movement technique enhancement card, the low-grade spirit stone, and the Rejuvenation Powder also returned to their places. His first high-level sign-in had yielded far more than expected. Not only had he obtained valuable items, but he had also deepened his bond with Xi Ren, gaining a stable energy source and special bond attribute bonuses.

"Next, I should make good use of these resources to solidify my eighth-grade realm and attempt to break through to the mid-eighth-grade." Lin Chen sat cross-legged, taking out a low-grade spirit stone and holding it in his hand. The spirit stone felt warm to the touch, containing pure and gentle spiritual energy from heaven and earth. He circulated his cultivation technique and began to absorb it.

The spiritual energy entered his body, quickly transforming into pure internal energy, and his cultivation experience points began to increase slowly and steadily. Combined with the continuous effect of [Affinity Nourishment] and the many new resources he had acquired, his cultivation speed would reach an unprecedented peak.

As night deepened, only the boy's even, long breaths echoed within the Listening Bamboo Pavilion, mingling with the barely perceptible spiritual light emanating from the spirit stone in his palm.

The night at the Yihong Courtyard had been fruitful. And the path ahead seemed to be becoming clearer with the increase in strength and the acquisition of resources.


Chapter 17 Cultivating the Vajra Fist, Breaking Through to the Mid-Eighth Rank

Since returning from that night at the brothel, Lin Chen's life had returned to an extremely disciplined and focused routine. During the day, he went to the library, no longer confined to martial arts texts, but also beginning to peruse historical records, geographical accounts, and other unusual tales, striving for a more comprehensive understanding of the history, structure, and power distribution of this high-martial-arts world. The Great Chu Dynasty's territory was vast, with barbarian tribes eyeing it from the north, numerous kingdoms standing to the west, the mysterious Ten Thousand Mountains of the southern border, and rumors of immortal islands beyond the East Sea. While Jinling was wealthy, it was merely a corner of the southeast. True powerhouses mostly hid in famous mountains and rivers, in sacred sects, or served the imperial court and military. The Jia family, this so-called "Duke's family," was probably barely second-rate in the entire Great Chu martial arts world.

This broadened perspective didn't make him overly ambitious; instead, it strengthened his resolve to proceed steadily and cautiously. Improving his strength remained his top priority.

Nighttime was his unwavering time for intensive cultivation. He drank a cup of Tranquil Tea daily, its effects remarkable in calming the mind, suppressing allure, and proving remarkably effective. Holding a low-grade spirit stone in his palm, its pure spiritual energy continuously transformed into his inner energy, steadily increasing his cultivation experience. The four streams of energy (Daiyu, Xiangyun, Baochai, and Xiren) provided by the [Affection Nourishment] technique flowed continuously, each with its own unique uses, ensuring his cultivation foundation was incredibly solid, without any signs of weakness.

The core of his cultivation lay in consolidating and enhancing his newly acquired "Vajra Fist" and his recent breakthrough to the early stage of the eighth rank.

In the courtyard, the specially selected, harder and thicker "Ironback Stones" became Lin Chen's exclusive training targets. He had mastered the first five forms of the Vajra Fist, each form's power generation techniques, internal energy coordination, and footwork transitions deeply ingrained in his bones, becoming second nature. But Lin Chen was not satisfied with this. The experience of a martial arts master from his previous life told him that true strength lay in "transformation," not "training." Truly internalizing what he had learned and forming a combat system best suited to himself was the right path.

He began to try integrating certain power generation techniques from the "Stone-Splitting Fist" into the "Vajra Fist." Although the Stone-Splitting Fist was of a lower rank, its application of "collision," "vibration," and "penetration" had unique advantages in certain situations. Especially the "vibration" technique, with its instantaneous high-frequency internal energy vibrations, penetrated defenses and struck the internal organs, complementing the "unyielding ferocity" of the Vajra Fist.

Initially, the fusion was quite difficult. The two sets of fist techniques differed in their internal energy circulation routes and the muscle groups they used for power. Forcibly combining them not only failed to increase power but also led to internal energy disorder and muscle strain. However, Lin Chen possessed exceptional patience. With the calming tea to stabilize his mind and spirit stones to replenish his energy, he tried again and again, adjusting little by little.

He no longer pursued the fluency and elegance of the moves but focused on the most basic power generation. Facing the Ironback Stone, he would sometimes strike head-on with the "Vajra Starting Hand" of the Vajra Fist, but at the moment his fist touched the stone surface, he would abruptly switch to the "vibration" force of the Stone-Splitting Fist, with high-frequency internal energy vibration penetrating in; at other times, he would start with the "Mountain-Crushing Stance" of the Stone-Splitting Fist, but then incorporate the heavy chopping force of the "Vajra Subduing Demons" of the Vajra Fist, greatly increasing the power.

Failure, adjustment, more failure, more adjustment… Sweat soaked his clothes, turning into rising white steam in the cold winter. His arms ached and swelled from repeated, full-force strikes and the intense circulation of his internal energy; the tiger's mouth (between thumb and index finger) cracked, only to be quickly healed by the Rejuvenating Powder and his own powerful recovery. Yet his eyes remained calm, his mind unwavering.

Several days later, a turning point appeared. In an attempt to combine the spiritual awe of the fifth form of Vajra Fist, "Vajra's Wrathful Gaze," with the penetrating power of the Rock-Splitting Fist, he had a sudden inspiration, gaining a completely new understanding of the transmission and explosion of "force." It was no longer simply "throwing out a punch," but rather his internal energy flowing like water, surging from his dantian at the moment of impact, passing through his meridians, gathering at the fist's tip, and then, according to his will, either exploding with the fierce power of a Vajra, or penetrating with the high frequency of a rock-splitting force, or a combination of both—penetrating first, then exploding!

"Boom!"

A punch struck the Ironback Stone. There was no earth-shattering roar, but the surface of the thick, incredibly hard stone, over a foot thick, first showed a clear, inch-deep fist imprint. Then, centered on the fist imprint, countless fine, spiderweb-like cracks suddenly spread out, until they covered the entire stone! Then, the entire boulder silently crumbled into a pile of evenly distributed pebbles!

It wasn't a shattering, nor a fragmentation, but rather a complete "disintegration" of its internal structure by a strange, yet powerful, force!

Lin Chen withdrew his fist, gazing at the rubble, his eyes gleaming. He had succeeded! It wasn't a simple combination of techniques, but a true understanding of the subtleties of "force," a preliminary fusion of the essence of two fist techniques, forming his own unique way of generating power! This power combined the extreme strength of the Vajra Fist with the penetrating and resonant power of the Stone-Splitting Fist, multiplying its power, and making the use of internal energy more refined and efficient.

"This fist technique can be temporarily named 'Vajra Shaking the Mountain'," Lin Chen murmured to himself, a sense of exhilaration washing over him. This was more than just a fist technique; it represented the beginning of his true journey down the path of martial arts.

Just as this fist technique was beginning to fuse, and his control over power reached a new height, he felt his internal energy, already at the peak of the early eighth rank, suddenly become active and surging, like a brimming river awaiting a new breakthrough.

The time had come!

Without hesitation, Lin Chen returned to his meditation room. He first consumed an "Internal Energy Pill," its pure medicinal power transforming into a cool stream, nourishing his meridians, purifying his internal energy, and making it even more condensed and surging, preparing him for the final push to break through the barrier.

Then, he took out his treasured "Power Pill." The dark red pill felt slightly warm in his palm, radiating an alluring yet violent aura. Whether he could break through the barrier and enter the mid-eighth rank in one fell swoop depended on this pill.

He sat cross-legged, palms facing upwards, adjusting his state to its optimal level. The lingering aftertaste of the Cleansing Tea swirled in his mind, making his spirit as clear as a mirror. Four streams of karmic energy flowed gently, steadily nourishing his foundation. He took a deep breath and swallowed the Power Pill.

The pill entered his stomach, and the familiar scorching torrent erupted once more! But this time, Lin Chen was prepared. His mind was calm, and he fully activated the *Small Circulation Inner Breath Technique*, guiding this violent yet vibrant power. It was no longer simply about tempering his physical body, but about merging it with the surging inner breath within him, transforming it into an indestructible "heaven-opening hammer," launching its most ferocious attack against the more solid, yet clearer, barrier between the early and middle stages of the eighth rank!

"Thump! Thump! Thump!"

Within his inner vision, it was as if heavy drumbeats were resounding in his heart. Each impact of the inner breath torrent caused the invisible barrier to tremble violently, its light flickering uncertainly. The medicinal power of the Strength Pill burned wildly, providing a continuous stream of surging power. The pure medicinal power of the Inner Breath Pill ensured the quality and cohesion of the impacting force.

Lin Chen's skin turned crimson again, steam rising from it, with wisps of white vapor even condensing into a pillar above his head. Yet, his expression was solemn, his eyes resolute, all distracting thoughts banished, his mind completely immersed in guiding this torrent of breakthrough power.

Under repeated impacts, the barrier began to show minute cracks. These cracks rapidly expanded and spread, like ice about to split.

"Now! Vajra Shakes the Mountain, break!"

Lin Chen roared inwardly, channeling his newly comprehended "force," a fusion of the Vajra and Rock-Splitting Fist intents, into this final surge of internal energy! It was no longer merely a piling up of power, but carried an unstoppable, mountain-shattering martial will!

"Boom—!"

It was as if a thunderclap exploded in his mind! The already cracked barrier finally shattered and disintegrated completely under this strike imbued with a new fist intent!

A new inner energy, more vast, purer, and seemingly imbued with a balance of strength and gentleness, surged forth from behind the shattered barrier like a bursting dam, instantly engulfing his entire body! His dantian expanded in jubilation, his meridians widened and strengthened in a roar, and his blood and qi, like a volcano ablaze, boiled and erupted with vitality and power far exceeding anything before!

His bones crackled like popping beans, becoming denser and harder; his muscle fibers were torn and reorganized again, becoming more flexible and bursting with explosive power; his internal organs seemed to be cleansed and strengthened, brimming with vitality. His five senses and six perceptions reached new heights, his range of perception of the primordial energy of heaven and earth more than doubled, and he could even vaguely perceive subtle differences in the attributes of the primordial energy.

Mid-stage Eighth Rank, a natural progression, a complete success!

Lin Chen slowly opened his eyes, two tangible beams of light flashing within them, illuminating the slightly dim room. He exhaled a long, drawn-out breath, which condensed into a foot-long, pale golden arrow of energy before him, remaining stagnant for several breaths before slowly dissipating.

He felt a transformative change within his body. His internal energy had nearly doubled compared to his early eighth-grade state, its purity surpassing anything before. Its circulation was smooth and effortless, possessing a solid, mountain-like quality, yet also harboring a destructive power. His maximum blood and qi value had broken through to 250, his mental strength had increased to 95, and his physique, thanks to the combined effects of the Power Pill and his breakthrough, had stabilized at 8 points, even showing a faint tendency to climb towards 9.

With a thought, his figure vanished from the futon and reappeared in the courtyard. Without using any light-footed movement, his physical speed alone was as fast as a ghost. He casually threw a punch, striking another intact iron-backed stone three zhang away.

"Pfft!"

With a soft thud, the air was compressed into a faint, transparent ripple as the fist struck the center of the Ironback Stone precisely. The stone's surface trembled slightly, and then, centered on the point of impact, a clear, two-inch-deep fist imprint suddenly appeared, its edges smooth as if carved by a sharp blade, while the rest of the stone remained completely intact! This was a manifestation of mastering internal energy to a profound level, an extreme concentration of power!

"Good!" Lin Chen withdrew his fist, satisfied. At the mid-stage of the eighth rank, combined with the fusion of fist intent, Vajra Fist, Light and Agile Step, and numerous trump cards, his true combat strength was likely enough to easily defeat an ordinary late-stage eighth rank martial artist, and even contend with a martial artist newly entering the peak of the eighth rank. Among the younger generation of the Jia family, apart from those who might be hiding their strength or had already gone out to train, probably no one was his match. Even among the entire younger generation of martial artists in Jinling City, he was enough to rank among the upper-middle class.

More importantly, this breakthrough was not simply a matter of accumulating strength, but rather accompanied by a profound understanding of the "internal force" of martial arts and the initial construction of his own boxing system. This has far-reaching significance for his future path.

He walked to the water vat in the courtyard, scooped up the cold water, and poured it on his face and head, washing away the impurities and heat expelled during his breakthrough, gradually calming his turbulent emotions.

The improvement in strength was certainly gratifying, but it likely brought with it more attention, a more complex situation, and… even stronger potential opponents. Jia She's covetousness wouldn't disappear, Aunt Zhao's resentment would only deepen, and the world outside the Jia family was teeming with powerful figures.

"I can't let my guard down." Lin Chen wiped the water droplets from his face, his gaze fixed on the western sky. The setting sun painted the horizon a magnificent orange-red. "The sixth form of the Vajra Fist, 'Vajra Pushing the Mountain,' and the seventh form, the ultimate killing move, 'Vajra Nirvana,' still need to be mastered as soon as possible. Movement techniques, internal strength, and spirit—all aspects need further refinement. And that fragment of the Green Edge Sword…"

He returned to his quiet room and changed into dry clothes. The afterglow of his breakthrough still lingered within him, but he had already begun planning his next step. The next important milestone indicated in the outline seemed to be "checking in at Xiaoxiang Pavilion, receiving a handkerchief from Daiyu," and the ensuing emotional escalation. Daiyu's favorability rating had reached 65 points (admiration), and her energy supply was at its purest and most abundant, crucial for maintaining the "affection nourishment," and could not be lost.

Moreover, he did indeed harbor a unique pity and appreciation for the aloof, talented, yet tragically fated Lin Daiyu. This feeling, under the influence of his succubus constitution and the continuous energy interaction, seemed to be subtly changing.

"Tomorrow, perhaps I should go to Xiaoxiang Pavilion," Lin Chen pondered. He could also complete his daily check-in.


Chapter 18 Daiyu visits the sick, and their feelings intensify.

Having broken through to the mid-stage of the eighth rank, Lin Chen had begun to grasp the basics of "internal strength." His heart was filled with excitement, and he longed to immediately master the sixth form of the Vajra Fist, "Vajra Pushing the Mountain." This form was a crucial turning point in the Vajra Fist, transitioning from external to internal strength and from hardness to softness. It emphasized accumulating power internally and releasing it externally, using the whole body as a bow and the fist's intent as an arrow, unleashing the concentrated power like pushing down a mountain—its power far surpassing the previous five forms. The manual's annotations even mentioned that once this form was mastered, it could injure enemies from a distance, and its force was indestructible.

Driven by his eagerness to succeed and his newly acquired, exquisite control over his power, Lin Chen became somewhat impatient when trying to grasp the key points of the "Vajra Pushing the Mountain" technique. Following the diagram, his internal energy needed to travel along an extremely complex and obscure meridian route, instantly completing nine rapid compressions and expansions in his chest and abdomen, finally merging with his fist strike for a thunderous explosion. This route involved several obscure acupoints, demanding an almost demanding level of breath control.

In his first attempt, his internal energy flowed slightly too quickly. As it passed a minor branch between the "Shanzhong" and "Zhongting" acupoints, the energy strayed slightly, failing to follow its intended path. Lin Chen sensed something was wrong and tried to forcefully correct it, but it was too late. The diverted energy, like a runaway horse, crashed into a small meridian rarely used by internal energy, triggering a chain reaction that caused a sudden and chaotic reversal of blood and energy in his chest and abdomen!

"Pfft!"

Lin Chen groaned, his face instantly turning deathly pale. He felt as if his chest had been struck by a heavy hammer, a tearing pain shooting through him. A sweet taste rose in his throat, and he coughed up a small mouthful of blood. He staggered back a few steps, grabbing onto the stone table in the courtyard to barely steady himself. The internal energy that had been surging like a river within his body was now in chaos, raging wildly in his chest and abdomen, causing waves of excruciating pain. Cold sweat poured down his forehead.

He'd got a side stitch! And it happened while practicing a profound fist technique; his internal energy had gone astray, injuring his meridians! If he hadn't just broken through, his body and meridians not having been strengthened by the Power Pill and his increased cultivation level, making them far more resilient than ordinary eighth-rank martial artists, this would likely have been more than just a minor injury; it would have ruptured meridians and even caused a regression in his cultivation.

"I was careless..." Lin Chen thought with a chill. He quickly endured the excruciating pain, sat cross-legged, and began to fully circulate his internal energy using the "Small Circulation Inner Breathing Technique," guiding the chaotic internal energy back to his dantian and calming his turbulent blood and qi. However, the disordered energy was like a stubborn nail, lodged between his chest and abdomen. Each flow of internal energy brought a needle-like stinging pain, greatly reducing the effectiveness of his breathing regulation. After several attempts, not only did he fail to correct the disordered energy, but he also aggravated his injuries, coughing up several mouthfuls of blood-tinged stagnant blood, and his face became even paler.

"It seems I'll need to rely on elixirs or ask a master to help me clear my disordered internal energy," Lin Chen said with a wry smile. He hadn't expected that his recent breakthrough, filled with youthful exuberance, would lead to such a consequence so quickly due to his impatience. While the internal injury wasn't fatal, if not treated promptly, it could leave lasting problems and affect his future cultivation. He had the Rejuvenating Powder, but it primarily treated external injuries and had limited effectiveness against disordered internal energy. Asking a master? Within the Jia family, who could he trust who possessed such ability…?

His first thought was of Daiyu. It wasn't that he hoped Daiyu possessed profound inner strength, but rather that her sensitive nature might offer another solution. Moreover, for some reason, in his weakened state, he subconsciously longed to see her.

Just as his mind raced, considering whether to force himself to go to Xiaoxiang Pavilion or summon a doctor (the manor had its own physicians, but they mostly treated the masters; as a member of a collateral branch, he might not be able to get one, and he didn't want to easily reveal his injuries), Xueyan's clear, slightly anxious voice came from outside the courtyard gate:

"Is Young Master Lin here? Our young lady sent me to check on things; I think I heard some noise over here..."

Lin Chen's heart stirred slightly, and he was about to reply when a dull pain shot through his chest, causing him to cough twice.

Xue Yan outside the door seemed to have heard him, her voice growing more urgent: "Young Master Lin? Are you alright? The young lady was worried and asked me to come and check on you." She gently pushed the courtyard gate. The gate wasn't fully latched and creaked open a crack.

Lin Chen took a deep breath, trying to keep his voice steady: "Is that Xue Yan? I'm fine. I just strained my breath while practicing, but I'll be fine after a short while. Thank you for your concern, Miss Lin."

"Strained your breath?" Xue Yan exclaimed in surprise, not caring about anything else. She pushed the door open and immediately saw Lin Chen sitting cross-legged on the ground, pale-faced, with a trace of blood at the corner of his mouth. Her face paled with fright. "Young Master! You...you call this alright? You look terrible, you even coughed up blood! Please wait, I'll go tell the young lady and get a doctor!"

“No need to disturb the doctor,” Lin Chen hurriedly said. He knew the rules of the manor well; if he injured himself while practicing martial arts and called a doctor, it would inevitably cause trouble. “It’s just a minor choking; I can regulate my breathing myself. Go back and tell Miss Lin I’m fine, and ask her not to worry.”

Xue Yan was unwilling to believe him, stamping her foot anxiously, “Young Master, please don’t be stubborn! You look like this… No, I have to go tell Miss!” With that, before Lin Chen could stop her again, she turned and ran off, her steps hurried.

Lin Chen watched Xue Yan’s departing figure, shaking his head helplessly, yet feeling a slight warmth in his heart. Daiyu… was so observant, even noticing the slightest disturbance on his side.

He stopped thinking about it and continued to concentrate on regulating his breathing, trying to dispel the chaotic energy, but with little effect; the tightness and pain in his chest only worsened.

About the time it takes for an incense stick to burn, hurried yet light footsteps came again from outside the courtyard gate; more than one person.

"Brother Lin!" A trembling voice, clear yet anxious, called out. Daiyu had arrived in person! She had clearly come in a hurry, wearing only a silver-skin cloak, her hair loosely tied, a few strands clinging to her cheeks flushed from her haste, and carrying a small food box. Xueyan followed behind her, panting.

As soon as Daiyu entered the courtyard, her gaze locked onto Lin Chen, who sat cross-legged on the ground, his face pale. Seeing the bloodstains on his lips and the undisguised pain in his eyes, Daiyu's eyes instantly welled up with tears, her heart clenching as if it had been violently torn apart. She rushed forward, knelt down, and, disregarding any propriety between men and women, reached out to touch Lin Chen's forehead, finding it ice-cold.

"How...how did you get hurt like this?" Daiyu's voice trembled, choked with sobs, "Xueyan, quick, bring out the medicine from the food box!"

"Yes, Miss!" Xueyan quickly opened the food box, inside was a small warm pot, filled more than halfway with a dark brown soup that emitted a strong medicinal aroma and was still slightly steaming. Clearly, Daiyu had heard of his injury and rushed over with medicine immediately.

"Miss Lin, I'm fine, I just strained my chest a little while practicing my martial arts..." Lin Chen looked at Daiyu's anxious, worried, and tearful appearance, and a soft spot in his heart was deeply touched; even the pain in his chest seemed to lessen.

"You say you're fine!" Daiyu interrupted him, her eyes reddening. She took the bowl of medicine from Xueyan, gently stirred it with a spoon, blew on it, tested the temperature, and then carefully held it to Lin Chen's lips. "This is a decoction of the 'Nourishing Blood Pill' I usually take. It's excellent for replenishing qi and blood, strengthening the body's foundation. Drink it first to warm yourself and calm your breathing. Xueyan, go and fetch a basin of hot water, make it very hot."

Her voice held an undeniable firmness, yet her movements were incredibly gentle, as if she feared shattering him. Her eyes, usually as cold as piercing stars, were now brimming with undisguised heartache and concern.

Lin Chen gazed at her exquisitely beautiful face, so close to his, slightly pale with worry. He inhaled the cool, delicate fragrance mingled with the scent of medicine emanating from her, and a warm current welled up within him. He didn't refuse again, and slowly drank the warm medicine from Daiyu's hand. The medicine was bitter, but it transformed into a gentle warmth in his stomach, slowly spreading and nourishing his damaged meridians. The tightness in his chest did indeed lessen slightly.

Seeing that he was willing to drink the medicine, Daiyu breathed a slight sigh of relief. With a clean silk handkerchief, she carefully wiped the medicine stains and bloodstains from the corners of his mouth. Her fingers were slightly cool, and her movements were as gentle as a feather's touch.

Xueyan quickly brought hot water, soaked a towel, and wrung it out. Daiyu took it and personally applied it to Lin Chen's forehead, then used another hot towel to gently wipe the cold sweat from his face. As she did this, her expression was focused, as if she were doing the most important thing in the world, completely devoid of her usual aloofness and coldness, only a gentle, almost instinctive desire to care for him.

"Brother Lin, lean on me a little, don't force yourself." Seeing his stiff posture, Daiyu knew he was in chest pain, so she gestured for Xueyan to help. The two of them, one on each side, carefully supported Lin Chen, letting him lean slightly against their shoulders, finding a slightly more comfortable position. Her cool, delicate fragrance wafted more clearly, carrying a calming, reassuring power.

Lin Chen leaned against Daiyu's slender yet firm shoulder, feeling her body tremble slightly, unsure whether from the cold or lingering fear. His heart softened, and he whispered, "I frightened you."

"Mmm," Daiyu responded softly, her voice choked with sobs, "In the future... don't push yourself so hard anymore. You must practice your martial arts, but your health is also important. If... if anything happens to you..." She didn't finish, only lowering her head slightly, a few warm tears silently falling onto Lin Chen's clothes.

She was crying. For his injury, and for the deep-seated, unspeakable fear and dependence within her.

Lin Chen felt a pang of pain in his heart, wanting to raise his hand to wipe her tears, but the movement aggravated his injury, causing him to cough twice. Daiyu quickly patted his back to soothe him, but the tears in her eyes flowed even more fiercely.

“Miss Lin, don’t cry.” Lin Chen caught his breath and said softly, “I promise you, I will be more careful from now on. I was too hasty this time.”

“You’re always like this…” Daiyu looked up at him, her eyes blurry with tears, her gaze filled with complex emotions: concern, blame, dependence, and an emotion she herself hadn’t fully understood. “You bear everything alone, practicing your martial arts, facing those evil people… Can’t you… take better care of yourself? In this manor, besides the Old Ancestor, only you… are truly willing to protect me. If you…” She couldn’t finish her sentence, only looking at him as if trying to etch his image into her heart.

“I’ll be alright.” Lin Chen looked into her eyes and said earnestly, “I still need to… protect you, protect the people you care about. How could I let myself fall so easily?”

His words were simple, yet carried a heavy weight. Daiyu stared at him, as if seeing into the depths of his eyes for the first time so clearly—eyes that held unwavering resolve, tenderness, a profound depth she couldn't comprehend, and a tenderness reserved only for her that made her heart tremble. The walls around her heart crumbled silently in that moment.

"Ding! Detected a significant emotional fluctuation in the important plot character 'Lin Daiyu,' who has developed a deep dependence, pity, admiration, and possessiveness towards the host, greatly deepening the emotional bond. The succubus constitution passive effect has been triggered to its maximum. Gain +25 favorability with Lin Daiyu (Devotion → Unwavering Devotion). Gain a massive amount of cool, pure, and ethereal 'Essence of Affection Energy,' instantly nourishing and repairing damaged meridians and blood, rapidly improving internal injuries. Special effect: Unlocks a new passive effect for the succubus constitution—Soothing the Mind (Beginner). The host can actively release alluring aura, transforming it into gentle and tranquil mental fluctuations to soothe the target's tension, anxiety, sadness, and other negative emotions. The effect is related to the target's favorability towards the host and the host's mental strength. Simultaneously, this process can slightly improve the host's own mental cultivation and mental control."

The system's notification was more solemn than ever before, and the energy that surged in was far greater than ever before!
